tweets.author: flexeio.bsky.social
tweets.text: Add a block height to every claim, not just a date. Saylor has anchored his decade-long Bitcoin capital narrative to specific moments in time. Block height makes it verifiable, sequential, unchallengeable. That is credibility no PR firm can manufacture.
